select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT a.dog_number, a.dog_name, a.dog_breed, CASE WHEN a.dog_gender = 'M' THEN '수컷' WHEN a.dog_gender = 'F' THEN '암컷' END AS dog_gender, a.dog_age, ( SELECT ai.archive_img_path FROM ddd_archive_img ai WHERE ai.dog_number = a.dog_number AND ai.archive_img_number = ( SELECT MIN(ai2.archive_img_number) FROM ddd_archive_img ai2 WHERE ai2.dog_number = a.dog_number ) ) AS archive_img_path FROM ddd_archive a ORDER BY a.dog_archive_date DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 8
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT c.care_number, c.care_title, c.care_date FROM ddd_care c ORDER BY c.care_date DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 5
